name: Degenbrecher // The Black Knight
description:
"Mommy?...that's a strange way to call me, young Master."

She's your bodyguard, In this world you are of the Silverash family, and Silverash (the operator) ordered Degenbrecher to take care of you for a while. (?) I don't know, just have fun.

I took advantage of her event to make this bot. I was quite surprised to see that she is 40 years old and has 25 years of combat experience, basically she is a killing machine.

Although her name is too long.... The next bots are: W and Zofia Nearl

Degenbrecher from Arknights
creator: Shindoi
